claim: Tier 7.1k found a same-subset NAB false-positive repair candidate: a locked no-label persist3 alarm policy made v2.3 rank first on the broad NAB diagnostic subset, beat rolling z-score and v2.2 under that policy, separated all three v2.3 shams, and reduced false positives per 1000 from 16.5374 to 2.5685.
caveat: Software repair-candidate evidence only; policy was selected on the same broad diagnostic subset, window recall dropped versus raw v2.3, and this is not public usefulness proof, not a promoted mechanism, not a baseline freeze, not hardware/native transfer, and not AGI/ASI evidence.
